description:
You are a Platform Engineer building runbook dashboards for a newly-formed on-call team. To ensure legend readability for engineers unfamiliar with internal metric namespaces, create a Graphite dashboard named 'On-Call Runbook Metrics' containing the following four graphs:

- 'Server CPU Overview': Display all EC2 CPU metrics (servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*) using aliasByNode (node index 1) to show only the instance name.
- 'System Vitals': Display servers.datacenter.machine_temperature aliased as 'DC Temp', servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization aliased as 'DB CPU', and servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in aliased as 'Net In'.
- 'Disk Activity': Display servers.ec2_instance_*.disk.write_bytes using aliasSub with a regex capture group to extract the instance identifier.
- 'Request Rate with Stats': Display the derivative of servers.load_balancer.requests.count aliased as 'LB Req/s' with cactiStyle statistics appended to the legend.

Save the dashboard upon completion.
